rationale: Educ. Code §11.1518 governs school district board of trustee information posting requirements. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: Each school district that maintains an Internet website shall post on the website the name, e-mail address, and term of office, including the date the term began and the date the term expires, of each member of the district's board of trustees.
_note: No conflict. Rule concerns trustee information disclosure, not homestead exemptions or tax policy.
